response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished senior/staff full-stack software engineer with strong web, backend, and some embedded experience, but the role demands deep hardware-software co-design expertise — SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture, and DNN training/inference optimization — none of which appear in the resume. While the years-of-experience threshold for a BS holder is met on paper, the technical domain mismatch is severe and the resume shows no exposure to chip-level performance work or ML systems internals.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Some low-level / systems exposure (C/C++ at National Instruments, low-latency DLang services at Sociomantic)
BS in CS plus extensive professional experience satisfies the formal education+experience requirement
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, computer architecture, or hardware design experience
No demonstrated AI accelerator, GPU architecture, or DNN training/inference optimization background
Career is product/application software focused, not hardware-software co-design or performance architecture

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and HW-SW co-design experience
No AI accelerator / GPU / DNN performance optimization background
Strong general software engineering tenure and systems-adjacent experience
